scripts.db:migrate: psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d accessibility_db -f migrations/01-schema.sql && psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d accessibility_db -f migrations/02-seed-data.sql
scripts.db:reset: dropdb -h localhost -U postgres accessibility_db && createdb -h localhost -U postgres accessibility_db && npm run db:migrate
